message:
fix(db): enforce project boundary in get_messages_details_by_ids

Add an optional `project_id` parameter to `get_messages_details_by_ids`
so that search-result hydration respects project isolation.  When
`Some(pid)`, an extra `AND m.project_id = ?` clause is appended,
preventing cross-project data leakage.  When `None` (used by internal
index rebuilds), all matching messages are returned as before.

The sole call-site in `canonicalize_message_results` now forwards
`query.project_id` through, closing the gap where vector-search hits
from one project could leak into another project's results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
